case_title: FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP, A CALIFORNIA VS. EDWIN THOMPSON-BRADSHAW ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $50.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMPSON-BRADSHAW, EDWIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1510 EDDY STREET, #603 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
